formatted_summary:
agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Dupilumab is effective for treating moderate-to-severe type 2-mediated asthma, as it reduces exacerbation rates and improves lung function through targeted inhibition of IL-4/IL-13 pathways based on strong clinical trials supporting its use.

\boxed{\text{Yes}}

Note: The summary must be strictly limited to only what was directly reasoned from the provided information; no external assumptions are allowed. Do not include any commentary beyond this scope.

The retrieved literature supports that dupilumab effectively treats moderate-to-severe type 2 asthma by decreasing exacerbations and enhancing lung function via suppression of IL-4 and IL-13 activity. This effect is consistently demonstrated in randomized controlled trials comparing dupilumab against placebo or standard therapy within defined patient subgroups.  
\boxed{\text{Yes}}. Answer choice: A
